tasks.name: Create dashboard loader file skeleton with imports and cache wrapper
tasks.purpose: Set up the loader file structure with server-only directive, imports, logger setup, and main function signature with cache wrapper

files: apps/web/app/home/[account]/members/_lib/server/members-page.loader.ts - Pattern reference for logger and Promise.all
apps/web/app/home/[account]/_lib/server/team-account-workspace.loader.ts - Pattern reference for cache() wrapper and type export
constraints: Must use 'server-only' directive at top
Must use createServiceLogger with 'DASHBOARD-PAGE-LOADER' name
Main function must be wrapped with cache()
Export type DashboardPageData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof loadDashboardPageData>>

tasks.input_state: Directory apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/ exists with load-user-workspace.ts; dashboard-page.loader.ts does not exist
tasks.output_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists with server-only directive, imports, logger, cached main function signature, and type export stub
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with correct structure, passes typecheck, and exports loadDashboardPageData function wrapped with cache()
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'server-only' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'export const loadDashboardPageData = cache' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'export type DashboardPageData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Implement loadCourseProgress query function
tasks.purpose: Query course_progress and lesson_progress tables to calculate overall completion percentage and completed lesson count

files: apps/web/lib/database.types.ts - course_progress and lesson_progress table types
dependencies: Supabase RLS ensures user sees only their own course_progress
constraints: Must query both course_progress and lesson_progress tables
Must throw error if query fails (don't return null)
Must use logger.error for error logging with operation context
Return empty/default data structure if no progress exists (user hasn't started course)

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists with skeleton; loadCourseProgress function not implemented
tasks.output_state: loadCourseProgress function queries course_progress and lesson_progress, returns CourseProgressData with completion percentage and lesson counts
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries correct tables, handles errors with logger, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadCourseProgress' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'course_progress' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'lesson_progress' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'logger.error' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Implement loadSurveyScores query function
tasks.purpose: Query survey_responses table to fetch category_scores JSONB from the user's latest assessment

dependencies: Supabase RLS ensures user sees only their own survey_responses
constraints: Must query survey_responses table ordered by created_at DESC, limit 1
Must extract category_scores JSONB field
Must use logger.error for error logging
Return null or empty structure if user hasn't completed assessment

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists with skeleton; loadSurveyScores function not implemented
tasks.output_state: loadSurveyScores function queries latest survey_responses, returns AssessmentScoreData with category scores
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries survey_responses correctly with ordering, handles errors, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadSurveyScores' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'survey_responses' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'category_scores' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Implement loadTasksSummary query function
tasks.purpose: Query tasks table to count tasks by status and identify the next task in 'do' status

dependencies: Supabase RLS ensures user sees only their own tasks
constraints: Must aggregate task counts by status (do, doing, done)
Must select next task with status='do' ordered by created_at ASC, limit 1
Must use logger.error for error logging
Return counts with zeros if no tasks exist

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists with skeleton; loadTasksSummary function not implemented
tasks.output_state: loadTasksSummary function queries tasks, returns TasksSummaryData with status counts and next task
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries tasks table, aggregates counts, finds next task, handles errors, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadTasksSummary' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'from.*tasks' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

Must return destructured array as object matching DashboardPageData type
Main function accepts SupabaseClient<Database> as parameter
Cache wrapper must be on the outer function
